headline: Is Salesforce Undervalued? Company Initiates Record $25 Billion Accelerated Stock Buyback
summary: Salesforce Inc (NYSE:CRM) launches a historic $25 billion accelerated share repurchase program. Read about Marc Benioff's strategy and the impact on shareholders.
